name: Coconut Dream Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 packages small pk jello instant pudding (vanilla)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the whipped topping using 1 cup of milk and vanilla extract.
2. Add the remaining 1 3/4 cups of cold milk and the jello instant pudding mix to the whipped topping.
3. Blend the mixture until well combined, then beat at high speed for 2 minutes.
4. Stir in the flaked coconut.
5. Spoon the filling into the prepared pie shell and refrigerate for 4 hours.
6. Garnish as desired.
